versions.version_description: This chords is different with others but it works for me.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                          YOU BELONG WITH ME - Taylor Swift
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Tabbed by: Amanda
Email: ibeatyouintennis@gmail.com

Capo 4


[Intro]

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
You're on the phone with your girlfriend, she's upset[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
She's going off about something that you said[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
'Cause she doesn't get your humor[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
Like I do[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I'm in my room, it's a typical Tuesday night[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I'm listening to the kind of music she doesn't like[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
and she'll never know your story[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
Like I do[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
But she wears short skirts[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I wear T-shirts[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
She's cheer captain and[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I'm on the bleachers[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Dreaming about the day[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
when you wake up and find that what you're[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
 looking for has been here the whole time[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
If you could see that I'm the one who understands you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
been here all along so why can't you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
see, you belong with[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
me, you belong with me[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Walkin' the streets with you and your worn-out jeans[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I can't help thinking this is how it ought to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Laughing on a park bench, thinking to myself[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  Hey, isn't this easy?[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
And you've got a smile that could light up this whole town[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I haven't seen it in a while since she brought you down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
You say you're fine, I know you better than that[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Hey, whatcha doing with a girl like that[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
She wears high heels[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I wear sneakers[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
She's cheer captain and[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I'm on the bleachers[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Dreaming about the day[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
when you wake up and find that what you're[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
 looking for has been here the whole time[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
If you could see that I'm the one who understands you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
been here all along so why can't you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
see, you belong with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Standing by and waiting at your back door[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
All this time how could you not know[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]
Baby...[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
You belong with me[/tab]
[tab]                ([ch]D[/ch])
You belong with me[/tab]


[Instrumental]

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]


[Bridge]

[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
Oh, I remember you drivin' to my house[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
in the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
I'm the one who makes you laugh[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
When you know you're about to cry[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
And I know your favorite songs[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
And you tell me about your dreams[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
Think I know where you belong[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch] 
Think I know it's with me...[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
Can't you see that I'm the one who understands you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Been here all along so why can't you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
see, you belong with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Standing by and waiting at your back door[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
All this time how could you not know[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]
Baby, you belong with[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
me, you belong with me[/tab]


[Outro]

[tab]                [ch]A[/ch]
You belong with me, have you ever thought[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]
Just maybe[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
you belong with me[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
You belong with me[/tab]
